Metadata.title: Natalie Pyndyk Design
Metadata.description: Natalia Pyndyk: Commercial, residential, and public space designer. Specializing in retail, office, Airbnb, home interiors, and business concepts.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Natalia Pyndyk Interior and architectural designer with over 8 years of experience in designing private and commercial spaces from initial concept through to execution. Private spaces designed for real living I create comprehensive projects for those who want a space to be tailored to them – functional, cohesive, designed with attention to the details and fully ready for your repair team to bring to life. My process is rooted in understanding your individual lifestyle, your habits, and what makes you feel truly at home to make your everyday life smoother, calmer, and more inspiring. My goal is to create interiors that work as beautifully as they look. Commercial spaces crafted with purpose and personality I design comprehensive, strategically crafted environments for commercial spaces — shops, restaurants, beauty salons, showrooms etc. My approach blends aesthetics, functionality, and brand identity to create interiors that not only look exceptional but also drive customer engagement and support business goals. Each project is built around a thoughtful concept and includes every detail needed to bring your space to life: aesthetic direction, materials selection, lighting design, marketing assets, visualizations, window display concepts, etc. Work experience Interior design (60+ projects) residences, apartments, retail, offices, HoReCa, beauty and medical establishments. Architectural design (20+ projects) wood-frame private houses, retail and offices concepts. Branding and graphic design (100+ projects) products, which is an integral part of the commercial projects. Awards 2024 - Custom home project 1st place, Best in show, AIBD (American Institute Of Building Design) 2023 - Custom home project 1st place, AIBD (American Institute Of Building Design) 2019 - Prize of the competition Get Me 2 the Top Ukraine, SBID (The Society of British & International Interior Design)

tile1.title: DESIGN PROJECT FOR COMMERCIAL & OFFICE SPACES
tile1.content: Concept studying the needs, brand analysis, premises analysis, defining a general style, sketching key ideas Planning development of zonal division, functional arrangement, customer journey, focal points, product placement Design in detail Development of all interior elements, displayed in 3D visualizations and materials selection Design of showcases and outdoor areas Letting people find out about your business without waiting for them to come in. Drawings Everything you need to implement the design: drawings for repair, drawings for furniture and custom elements execution Graphic elements Design of POS-materials, navigation elements, signs and advertisement elements. Specification of equipment and materials Information of products and facing materials to be purchased

tile2.title: DESIGN PROJECT FOR PRIVATE SPACES
tile2.content: Concept studying the needs and preferences, premises analysis, defining a general style, sketching key ideas Planning development of zonal division, functional arrangement Design in detail Development of all interior elements, displayed in 3D visualizations and materials selection Drawings Everything you need to implement the design: drawings for repair, drawings for furniture and custom elements execution Specification of equipment and materials Information of products and facing materials to be purchased

tile3.content:
<title>SUPERVISION</title>We will gladly guide you through the implementation of your project and help you avoid unforeseen situations and issues along the way.

<title>PARTIAL PROJECT</title>If you don't need the entire list of services, or you are already at a certain stage of work on the premises, please contact us to discuss an optimal project for you.

<title>CONSULTING</title>If you hesitate about your project you can always contact us for advice. We can help you if:
you are not sure if a certain premiss is the right choice
you want to consider the ideas for using the space
you need an outside view on the possibilities of improving the space
